---
title: "Manuscript additional plots"
author: Yanting Xiong
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-10"
---

# This R script is created to generate some additional plots that might be used in the manuscript

# Library loading
```{r library_loading}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

```

# Dataset loading
```{r dataset_loading}
# Load in the filtered and wrangled Parkinson's metadata
parkinsons_metadata_filt_cat = read.csv("../Datasets/Metadata/parkinsons_metadata_filt_cat.csv", row.names = 1)

parkinsons_metadata_filt_cat_moca_low = parkinsons_metadata_filt_cat %>% 
  filter(moca_total < 26) %>% 
  nrow() # 51 PD patients

```

# Visualize the distribution of MoCA Score using Histogram
```{r MoCA_score_visualization}
moca_histogram = ggplot(parkinsons_metadata_filt_cat, aes(x = moca_total)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25, fill = "steelblue", color = "black") +
  labs(x = "MoCA Score", y = "Number of PD Patients")
moca_histogram

```
